subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that His Majesty the King exerts the utmost patience, and with justice and equity wards off tyranny and favoritism. In a similar manner, the pillars of the monarchy and the ministers of the government
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الجلیل من السدره المبارکه مکاتیب متعدده واصل و بر مضامین اطلاع
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat]
